home.title: Reclaim the rhythm of your money.
home.lede: Monétika is a daily financial journal. No banking API, no gimmicks. Your numbers, your fingers, your judgement.

bullets.one: Log an expense in under five seconds.
bullets.two: Allocate your income across six buckets — necessities, emergency, education, investment, joy, giving.
bullets.three: Track your Financial Momentum Note month after month.

notFound.title: This page does not exist.
notFound.body: The link you followed may be stale, or the URL is misspelt.

generic.title: Something slipped.
generic.body: We logged the incident. Try again in a moment.
